title: More transparent honey and slime
description:
Increase the transparency of the slime block and honey blocks.  
that is all.  
By the way, chickens have nothing to do with it.
body:
## Increase the transparency of the slime and honey blocks.
**that is all.**
It's not completely transparent, but it makes it easier to see beyond that, right?
By the way, chickens have nothing to do with it.

It's a translation, so I could be wrong.
